name: HBO Max
reliabilityNotes: HBO Max (now Max) blocks many known VPN IP ranges, especially in the US. Some premium VPN providers work reliably with dedicated streaming servers.
troubleshootingTips: Use a VPN server in the US specifically optimized for streaming
Log out of HBO Max, reconnect your VPN, then log back in
Try connecting to a different US server if blocked
Clear browser cache or use a different browser profile
